name: Cai Mao (Degui)
page_title: Cai Mao (Degui) 蔡瑁 (德珪) [Liu Biao, Wei] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Was more a civil official than a naval commander.
	Did not put Liu Cong into power against Liu Biao’s wishes.
	Did not try to kill Liu Bei.
	There is little evidence that he was executed by Cao Cao.

full_text:
Cai Mao (Degui) 蔡瑁 (德珪)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cai Mao (蔡瑁), styledDegui (德珪), was born in Nan. Assisted Liu Biao in taking control of Jingzhou, prevented Liu Qi from visiting father. Cai Mao was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Wei Kingdom. Cai Mao lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
